CustomField.description: For CE_Finding records: confirms extraordinary circumstances were reviewed and none apply (or were mitigated). Required for every CE determination per 40 CFR 1501.4(b). When false on a CE_Finding, NEPA_Defensibility_Gap_Checker flags a defensibility gap.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: EC review complete and no extraordinary circumstances apply (required for CE findings).
CustomField.label: EC Review Complete
